scripts.dev: fuser -k 5000/tcp 3000/tcp 3001/tcp || true && concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.server: fuser -k 5000/tcp || true && npm --prefix server run dev
scripts.client: fuser -k 3000/tcp 3001/tcp || true && npm --prefix client run dev
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
